---
title: "Lemnos"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

A personal workshop — tools I actually use, documented the way I wish they had been.

## Registry

```{python}
#| echo: false
from IPython.display import HTML
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("registry.csv")
df["name"] = '<a href="' + df["file"] + '">' + df["name"] + "</a>"
df = df[["name", "category", "description"]]
df.columns = ["Tool", "Category", "Description"]
HTML(df.to_html(escape=False, index=False))
```

## How to use

Each page covers setup, key options, and the parts worth remembering. This is a reference, not a tutorial.
